data.title: Glassnode Data Reveals Bitcoin Miners Accumulation Surge—Price Set to Soar?
data.description:
TL;DR Miner Accumulation Surge: Bitcoin miners have shifted from selling to accumulating, adding approximately 2,700 BTC over the past month. Bullish Shift in Behavior: This accumulation comes as Bitcoin touches a key support level at $75K, with the price gaining around 20%, a sign of renewed Bitcoin miners confidence. Technical and Institutional Support: Bullish indicators. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/glassnode-data-reveals-bitcoin-miners-accumulation-surge-price-set-to-soar/

data.title: The United States has adjusted its additional tariffs on China at 00:01 a.m. Eastern Time on May 14.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the "Executive Order on Modifying Reciprocal Tariff Rates to Reflect Talks with the People's Republic of China" issued by the White House on May 12, the United States has revoked a total of 91% of tariffs imposed on Chinese goods (including goods from the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region and the Macao Special Administrative Region) pursuant to Executive Order No. 14259 of April 8, 2025 and Executive Order No. 14266 of April 9, 2025 at 00:01 am Eastern Time on May 14, and modified the 34% reciprocal tariff measures on Chinese goods (including goods from the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region and the Macao Special Administrative Region) imposed by Executive Order No. 14257 of April 2, 2025, of which 24% of tariffs will be suspended for 90 days, and the remaining 10% of tariffs will be retained. At the same time, the US also lowered or cancelled the tariffs imposed on small parcels from China (including small parcels from the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region), lowered the ad valorem tax rate for international mail from 120% to 54%, and cancelled the measure originally scheduled to increase the specific tax from US$100 per piece to US$200 per piece on June 1, 2025. (Xinhua News Agency)

data.title: JuChain and JuCoin jointly launched the native protocol Butterfly, and the nodes were sold out in 18 minutes
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, JuChain's ecological native protocol Butterfly launched node rush purchase at 18:00 today. A total of 3,000 limited node places were opened in this round, and they were sold out in just 18 minutes. Butterfly is defined as the core protocol component on JuChain, dedicated to building a diversified ecosystem driven by computing power, traffic and capital, and is considered to have growth potential and sustainable narrative capabilities. Industry analysts pointed out that the rapid sale of this node not only reflects the market's expectations for the native protocol project, but also marks an important step in the actual implementation and user participation of JuChain's ecological construction.

data.description:
U. S. Senators Cynthia Lummis and Bernie Moreno have urged Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent to swiftly revise a key tax policy definition that they argue is obstructing how American companies manage digital assets. In a letter dated May 12, Senators Lummis and Moreno urged Bessent to revise the current interpretation of “adjusted financial statement income” under existing U
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/05/14/senators-push-fix-to-crypto-tax-policy-before-its-too-late/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=senators-push-fix-to-crypto-tax-policy-before-its-too-late

data.title: Gold and Silver Prices Experience Notable Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, spot gold prices saw a sharp decline of $16, nearing the $3,200 per ounce mark. Meanwhile, spot silver prices fell by over 2% during the day, currently trading at $32.22 per ounce.

data.title: XRP and DOGE Futures Show Rising Speculation Amid Price Stagnation
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, despite a slowdown in spot prices, speculative positions in the futures markets for XRP and Dogecoin (DOGE) are increasing, indicating a growing market preference for volatility and downside risk. Data reveals significant changes in the futures market:

DOGE futures saw a 63.9% surge in open interest within a week, rising from $989 million to $1.62 billion, while the spot price increased by 40% to $0.23. Similarly, XRP futures experienced a 41.6% increase in open interest, with an addition of over $1 billion, though the spot price rose more modestly from $2.14 to $2.6.

Blockchain analytics firm Glassnode noted that the divergence between declining price momentum and the surge in open interest suggests a continuous buildup of speculative positions. This situation warrants caution, as open interest (OI) serves as an indicator of speculative activity. When OI diverges from stagnant prices, it often signals that leverage growth has outpaced actual market confidence—a pattern that has historically led to flash crashes.

data.title: Analysis: XRP and DOGE futures OI increased significantly over the past week, which may indicate increased speculative risks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Despite the slowdown in spot price gains, open interest (OI) in the XRP and Dogecoin (DOGE) futures markets has grown significantly over the past week, showing a warming of speculative sentiment in the market. According to data from on-chain analysis company Glassnode, DOGE futures open interest increased from $989 million to $1.62 billion, an increase of 63.9%; XRP futures open interest increased by 41.6%. The analysis pointed out that the divergence between futures positions and price trends may increase the risk of sharp market fluctuations and forced liquidation, and investors need to be wary of potential market corrections. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Decentralized OORT AI data hits top ranks on Google Kaggle
data.description:
An artificial intelligence training image data set developed by decentralized AI solution provider OORT saw considerable success on Google’s platform Kaggle. OORT’s Diverse Tools Kaggle data set listing was released in early April; since then, it has climbed to the first page in multiple categories. Kaggle is a Google-owned online platform for data science and machine learning competitions, learning and collaboration. Ramkumar Subramaniam, core contributor at crypto AI project OpenLedger, told Cointelegraph that “a front-page Kaggle ranking is a strong social signal, indicating that the data set is engaging the right communities of data scientists, machine learning engineers and practitioners
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/oort-decentralized-ai-dataset-climbs-kaggle-rankings?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Launches Trillion-Dollar Security Initiative
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the Ethereum Foundation has announced the launch of the 'Trillion-Dollar Security Initiative' aimed at enhancing the security of the Ethereum protocol through funding research, development, and audits. The project will be initially co-chaired by Fredrik Svantes, Head of Protocol Security, and Josh Stark from the EF management team.

The initiative will support security improvements for key clients, formal verification, fuzz testing, bug bounty programs, and community security education. The foundation emphasized the importance of ensuring the robustness and attack resistance of the protocol as the Ethereum ecosystem continues to expand.

Funding for the initiative will be provided through the Ethereum Ecosystem Support Program (ESP), encouraging global researchers and developers to participate in the effort.

data.title: U.S. House Committee Approves Trump Tax Cut Plan
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. House of Representatives Ways and Means Committee has approved President Donald Trump's tax cut proposal through a partisan vote. The decision marks a significant step in advancing the tax plan, which aims to reduce taxes across various sectors. The committee's approval reflects the ongoing political dynamics surrounding fiscal policies in the United States.

data.title: The estimated number of participating accounts in the RDAC airdrop accounts for about half of the total number of Alpha accounts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, RDAC airdrop: estimated number of participating accounts is 15,567, about half of the total number of Alpha accounts; PRAI IDO: raised a total of 63810.51 BNB, about 21,270 accounts participated, which is two-thirds of the previous IDO. When DOOD was launched, Binance announced that the number of Alpha accounts was 30,271. If there were no new accounts in the past five days, then the points consumption mechanism is indeed much more conservative after it was launched.

data.title: Bitcoin's Correlation with U.S. Stocks Weakens, Enhancing Its Diversification Appeal
data.description: According to Odaily, recent data indicates a weakening correlation between Bitcoin (BTC) and U.S. stocks, potentially increasing its appeal as a diversification tool rather than a safe-haven asset. Analysts highlight that although Bitcoin remains influenced by macroeconomic factors, its connection with traditional risk assets has diminished. Furthermore, institutional interest in Bitcoin continues to grow, with some companies incorporating it into their balance sheets. Experts suggest that as confidence in dollar assets fluctuates, Bitcoin may play a more significant role in investment portfolios.

data.title: Analysis: Rising US Treasury yields may be good for Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Although the 10-year U.S. Treasury yield continues to rise, the traditional view is that this puts pressure on risky assets such as Bitcoin (BTC), but analysts point out that the current upward yield is mainly due to fiscal expansion and rising sovereign risks, which may be beneficial to Bitcoin. Under the fiscal policy promoted by the Trump administration, the market expects the 10-year yield to rise to 6% in the next 12 to 18 months. Analysis points out that the continued high yield reflects the rising sovereign credit risk, which may enhance the attractiveness of Bitcoin as an alternative asset. (CoinDesk)
